channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled
item.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people on Wednesday, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil.

item.title: South American migrants deported to DRC say facing pressure to return home
item.description: Rights advocates have accused Trump administration of using third-country deportations to intimidate asylum seekers.

item.title: Top ministers quit after Peru’s president postpones F-16 fighter jet deal
item.description: The Trump administration has warned against Peru pulling out of the deal, saying it reflects 'bad faith' negotiations.

item.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessent says Gulf, Asian allies request swap lines
item.description: Bessent pushed back on allegations that Trump family's financial ties with UAE are driving decision to offer swap line.

item.title: Prediction market Kalshi docks three US candidates for betting on own races
item.description: Penalties come amid calls for greater oversight; company pledges to proactively police 'insider trading' on platforms.

item.title: Yamal scores but injured as Barcelona beat Celta to restore La Liga lead
item.description: Barcelona edge closer to sealing their La Liga title defence with win against Champions League-chasing Celta Vigo.

item.title: Man City topple Arsenal at Premier League summit with nervy win at Burnley
item.description: Manchester City relegate Burnley with 1-0 win to also take top spot from Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

item.title: Turkiye making efforts to revive Russia-Ukraine talks, says Erdogan
item.description: Turkish president meets NATO chief as Kyiv asks Ankara to host a leaders' level meeting with Russia.

item.title: Pope Leo urges justice reform in Equatorial Guinea’s prisons
item.description: Equatorial Guinea's prison conditions face scrutiny as Pope Leo pushes for humane treatment and reforms during his visit.

item.title: Israeli forces fire tear gas at funeral of Palestinians killed by settlers
item.description: Israeli forces raided the funeral of two Palestinians killed by settlers at a school in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Trump calls for Republicans to unify around budget reconciliation push
item.description: Budget reconciliation would allow conservative lawmakers to bypass Democratic opposition in Senate with simple majority.

item.title: US suspect accused of stealing Kristi Noem’s purse sentenced to three years
item.description: President Trump has used incidents of crime to justify ongoing National Guard deployment to the capital, Washington, DC.

item.title: Trump calls Virginia election ‘rigged’ after redistricting referendum
item.description: Trump’s comments came after the Virginia measure passed by a slim margy of 51.4 in favour and 48.5 against.

item.title: Sexual violence in the West Bank emerges as tool to intimidate Palestinians
item.description: Systematic sexual violence and harassment by Israeli soldiers, settlers displacing Palestinians in occupied West Bank.

item.title: Can a divided EU become a united voice against Israeli aggression?
item.description: Bloc's relationship with its biggest trading partner under increasing scrutiny.

item.title: Warner Bros and Paramount merger could reshape US media landscape
item.description: The deal faces regulatory scrutiny both for influence on media landscape, but also for foreign investments to fund it.

item.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum demands answers over CIA agents in Chihuahua
item.description: Mexico's Claudia Sheinbaum said the federal government was not informed of the inclusion of CIA officers in a drug raid.

item.title: Iran blames Trump’s blockade for diplomatic impasse as fragile truce holds
item.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says US and Israel will not achieve their goals 'through bullying'.

item.title: Bad optics? Israel jails soldiers who smashed Jesus statue in Lebanon
item.description: Critics say Israeli attacks on Christian sites challenge claims of a Judeo-Christian shared heritage and mutual respect.

item.title: Did UK universities pay to ‘spy’ on pro‑Palestine students?
item.description: UK universities allegedly hired a security firm with military intelligence ties to monitor pro-Palestine students.

item.title: Suspect in slaying of Colombian presidential hopeful arrested in Argentina
item.description: Authorities say a Colombian suspected of helping to organise the killing of Miguel Uribe was captured in Buenos Aires.

item.title: Israeli attacks on Lebanon kill at least five people, including journalist
item.description: Journalist Amal Khalil killed in Israeli attack in at-Tiri, Lebanon's Al Akhbar reports.

item.title: Chelsea sack Rosenior after only three months at Premier League club
item.description: Chelsea only appointed Liam Rosenior in January, but the FIFA Club World Cup holders have lost their last five games.

item.title: Iran says ‘fully prepared’ for football team’s World Cup participation
item.description: Tehran says all necessary arrangements have been made for participation in the tournament cohosted by the US.
